operational_definition: Whether the emitted control record was parseable and schema-valid.
Whether the route label matched the benchmark key.
Whether state-sensitive or interrupted cases were handled correctly where applicable.
Median full-response latency; downstream execution cannot proceed until the complete control record is available.
Total model token consumption associated with the completed requests in the summarized cell.
Conservative lower-bound proxy: max(0, FC + RA + SR - 200) for three-event slices, or max(0, FC + RA - 100) when state retention is not applicable.
